metadata.longdescription:
Leela Chess Zero (lc0) is an open-source chess engine based on neural networks and reinforcement learning. It is inspired by DeepMind's AlphaZero project and uses GPU acceleration (CUDA, OpenCL) or CPU backends to evaluate positions.
This package builds the lc0 engine itself. For pre-trained neural networks, install games-board/lc0-networks.
